top_signals.title: Fedorov out as Ukraine’s defense minister in major government shake-up
top_signals.summary: Ukrainian President Volodymyr Zelenskyy dismissed Mykhailo Fedorov as the country's minister of defense after just six months in office.
top_signals.why_it_matters: Geopolitical escalation affecting commodities, shipping and cross-asset volatility.

top_signals.title: First the coast guard, then an ICBM: China tests new, long-term ways to hold off rivals in Asia
top_signals.summary: Experts say Beijing used both methods to try out new, attention-grabbing and long-term ways to deter others from challenging its territorial claims.
top_signals.why_it_matters: Geopolitical escalation affecting commodities, shipping and cross-asset volatility.

top_signals.title: Accredited official statistics: Public Expenditure Statistical Analyses 2026
top_signals.summary: HM Treasury statistical data setting out the year's information on government spending.
top_signals.why_it_matters: Central-bank repricing affecting yields, FX, liquidity and equities.

top_signals.title: Ukraine to buy Chinese drone parts with EU funds - Financial Times
top_signals.summary: Ukraine to buy Chinese drone parts with EU funds  Financial Times
top_signals.why_it_matters: Geopolitical escalation affecting commodities, shipping and cross-asset volatility.

top_signals.title: Netflix stock falls as earnings forecast disappoints, company says it will give fewer engagement updates
top_signals.summary: Investors will be looking for updates on Netflix's ad-supported business, engagement metrics and how the streaming giant continues to consider potential M&A.
top_signals.why_it_matters: Digital asset volatility and institutional crypto positioning changes.

top_signals.title: Commission proposes €6.5 million to support almost two thousand dismissed workers in Belgium and Spain
top_signals.summary: European Commission Press release Brussels, 16 Jul 2026 The European Commission has proposed to mobilise €6.5 million from the European Globalisation Adjustment Fund for Displaced Workers (EGF) to support 1,928 workers following dismissals by hypermarket Cora in Belgium and in the car sector in Spain.
top_signals.why_it_matters: AI and semiconductor developments impacting technology leadership and capex cycles.

top_signals.title: Commission approves Czech capacity mechanism under Clean Industrial Deal State Aid Framework
top_signals.summary: European Commission Press release Brussels, 16 Jul 2026 The European Commission has approved, under EU State aid rules, Czechia's market-wide capacity mechanism. The measure aims to ensure there is sufficient capacity to produce or store electricity, or to reduce electricity consumption so that production meets demand in the long term.
top_signals.why_it_matters: AI and semiconductor developments impacting technology leadership and capex cycles.

top_signals.title: Commission approves €300 million Irish State aid scheme for temporary electricity price relief for energy-intensive companies
top_signals.summary: European Commission Press release Brussels, 16 Jul 2026 The European Commission has approved a €300 million Irish scheme to provide temporary electricity price relief for energy-intensive companies in line with the objectives of the Clean Industrial Deal.
top_signals.why_it_matters: AI and semiconductor developments impacting technology leadership and capex cycles.

top_signals.title: Lessons Learned from CISA’s Recent GitHub Leak
top_signals.summary: The Cybersecurity and Infrastructure Security Agency (CISA) has issued a postmortem on a data leak in which a contractor published dozens of internal CISA credentials -- including AWS Govcloud keys -- in a public GitHub repository for almost six months before being notified by KrebsOnSecurity. Experts say the gaps identified in the agency's initial response provide important lessons that all security teams should absorb.
